flow-definition.description: Download MacOS artifacts for macos_aarch64 from Artifactory location, do some verification and, if succesful, publish to GitHub<!-- Managed by Jenkins Job Builder -->

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SAPMACHINE_VERSION
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The SapMachine Release Tag to upload MacOS artifacts for. Should start with "sapmachine-". E.g. "sapmachine-17.0.6".

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: BINARY_SOURCE
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Artifactory location where SapMachine binaries should be taken from.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: SYMBOL_SOURCE
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Artifactory location where symbol bundle should be taken from.

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: NOTARIZED_SUFFIX
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Suffix to be appended to artifacts that are notarized.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: PUBLISH_CASKS
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: When set to true, update homebrew casks.
